summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
We are creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
If you would like to support our efforts, donations can be sent to intergalacticherald.sol
Metaverse Nomads #131 New Biggest Freighter in Star Atlas
Metaverse Nomads posted a video of their latest Star Atlas livestream.
WEEKLY STAR ATLAS NEWSLETTER #114
Aephia published their latest Star Atlas newsletter.
Star Atlas: SCORE VS SAGE (part 5) Lab Assistant Tutorial cont.
Beyond the Horizon posted a video continuing his tutorial of SAGE tools.
Star Atlas: CEO Michael Wagner Interview w/ Neo-Tokyo News
Beyond the Horizon posted a video replay of an interview with Star Atlas CEO Michael Wagner.
Atlas Brew #97
Star Atlas TV posted a video reply of the latest Atlas Brew.
The Rise of Corporations — Star Atlas Launches DAC Platform V0
Star Atlas published an article about the release of the DAC Platform.
STAR ATLAS #219 HOLY SH*T, also the DAC platform.
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video of Star Atlas updates.
Star Atlas 101 — I have $20, what can I do?
Galia Crafters published an article about how to play Star Atlas with $20.
